name: trackmania-nations-forever-client

metadata.name: trackmania-nations-forever-client
metadata.summary: An XML RPC client for Trackmania Nations Forever dedicated servers.

documentation:
# TrackMania Nations Forever Client

This Python client is intended to be used with the TM Nations Forever remote procedure endpoint.

The available methods are documented at [ListMethods](/ListMethods.html).

It has been built for the dedicated server version of `2011-02-21`.

The hardcoded TrackMania RPC method calls have been AI generated and mostly not tested!

## Usage Example

```python
from trackmania_client import TrackManiaClient as TMClient
import asyncio

async def main():
  HOST = 'localhost'
  PORT = 5000

  async with TMClient(HOST, PORT) as client:
    print('Connected!')
    await client.authenticate('SuperAdmin', 'SuperAdmin')
    print('Authenticated!')

    version = await client.get_version()
    print(f'Version: {version}')
    status = await client.get_status()
    print(f'Status: {status}')
    player_list = await client.get_player_list(100, 0)
    print(f'Players: {player_list}')


if __name__ == '__main__':
  asyncio.run(main())
```

If no response is received after the default timeout of 10 seconds a `TimeoutError` is raised.

## Callback Usage
```python
from trackmania_client import TrackManiaClient as TMClient
import asyncio

def callback_handler(callback: str, data: tuple):
  print(f'Callback: {callback}, {data}')

async def main():
  HOST = 'localhost'
  PORT = 5000

  async with TMClient(HOST, PORT) as client:
    print('Connected!')
    await client.authenticate('SuperAdmin', 'SuperAdmin')
    print('Authenticated!')

    client.register_general_callback_handler(callback_handler)

    result = await client.enable_callbacks()
    print(f'Callbacks enabled: {result}')

    echo = await client.echo()
    print(f'Echo: {echo}')

    client.unregister_general_callback_handler(callback_handler)

    result = await client.disable_callbacks()
    print(f'Callbacks disabled: {result}')

    echo = await client.echo()


if __name__ == '__main__':
  asyncio.run(main())
```

Output:
```
Connected!
Authenticated!
Callbacks enabled: True
Callback: TrackMania.Echo, echo param 2
Echo: True
Callbacks disabled: True
```

Handlers can also be registered to specific callbacks:
```python
from trackmania_client import TrackManiaCallback as TMCallback

client.register_callback_handler(TMCallback.ECHO, echo_callback_handler)
client.unregister_callback_handler(TMCallback.ECHO, echo_callback_handler)
```

documentation: GbxRemote Protocol specification: https://wiki.trackmania.io/en/dedicated-server/XML-RPC/gbxremote-protocol

methods.name: trackmania.gbx_remote_client.GbxRemoteClient.list_methods

documentation: Gets the points used for the scores in rounds mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_use_new_rules_round
documentation: Set if new rules are used for rounds mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_use_new_rules_round
documentation: Get if the new rules are used for rounds mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_team_points_limit
documentation: Set a new points limit for team mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_team_points_limit
documentation: Get the current and next points limit for team mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_max_points_team
documentation: Set a new number of maximum points per round for team mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_max_points_team
documentation: Get the current and next number of maximum points per round for team mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_use_new_rules_team
documentation: Set if new rules are used for team mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_use_new_rules_team
documentation: Get if the new rules are used for team mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_cup_points_limit
documentation: Set the points needed for victory in Cup mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_cup_points_limit
documentation: Get the points needed for victory in Cup mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_cup_rounds_per_challenge
documentation: Sets the number of rounds before going to next challenge in Cup mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_cup_rounds_per_challenge
documentation: Get the number of rounds before going to next challenge in Cup mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_cup_warm_up_duration
documentation: Set whether to enable the automatic warm-up phase in Cup mode. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_cup_warm_up_duration
documentation: Get whether the automatic warm-up phase is enabled in Cup mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_cup_nb_winners
documentation: Set the number of winners to determine before the match is considered over. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_cup_nb_winners
documentation: Get the number of winners to determine before the match is considered over.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_current_challenge_index
documentation: Returns the current challenge index in the selection, or -1 if the challenge is no longer in the selection.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_next_challenge_index
documentation: Returns the challenge index in the selection that will be played next.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.set_next_challenge_index
documentation: Sets the challenge index in the selection that will be played next.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_current_challenge_info
documentation: Returns a struct containing the infos for the current challenge.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_next_challenge_info
documentation: Returns a struct containing the infos for the next challenge.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_challenge_info
documentation: Returns a struct containing the infos for the challenge with the specified filename.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.check_challenge_for_current_server_params
documentation: Returns a boolean if the challenge with the specified filename matches the current server settings.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_challenge_list
documentation: Returns a list of challenges among the current selection of the server.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.add_challenge
documentation: Add the challenge with the specified filename at the end of the current selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.add_challenge_list
documentation: Add the list of challenges with the specified filenames at the end of the current selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.remove_challenge
documentation: Remove the challenge with the specified filename from the current selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.remove_challenge_list
documentation: Remove the list of challenges with the specified filenames from the current selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.insert_challenge
documentation: Insert the challenge with the specified filename after the current challenge. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.insert_challenge_list
documentation: Insert the list of challenges with the specified filenames after the current challenge. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.choose_next_challenge
documentation: Set as next challenge the one with the specified filename, if it is present in the selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.choose_next_challenge_list
documentation: Set as next challenges the list of challenges with the specified filenames, if they are present in the selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.load_match_settings
documentation: Set a list of challenges defined in the playlist with the specified filename as the current selection of the server. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.append_playlist_from_match_settings
documentation: Add a list of challenges defined in the playlist with the specified filename at the end of the current selection. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.save_match_settings
documentation: Save the current selection of challenge in the playlist with the specified filename, as well as the current gameinfos. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.insert_playlist_from_match_settings
documentation: Insert a list of challenges defined in the playlist with the specified filename after the current challenge. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_player_list
documentation: Returns the list of players on the server.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_player_info
documentation: Returns a struct containing the infos on the player with the specified login.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_detailed_player_info
documentation: Returns a struct containing the detailed infos on the player with the specified login.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_main_server_player_info
documentation: Returns a struct containing the player infos of the game server. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_current_ranking
documentation: Returns the current rankings for the race in progress.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_current_ranking_for_login
documentation: Returns the current ranking for the race in progress of the player with the specified login.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_scores
documentation: Force the scores of the current game. Only available in rounds and team mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_player_team
documentation: Force the team of the player. Only available in team mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_player_team_id
documentation: Force the team of the player by PlayerId. Only available in team mode.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_spectator
documentation: Force the spectating status of the player. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_spectator_id
documentation: Force the spectating status of the player by PlayerId. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_spectator_target
documentation: Force spectators to look at a specific player. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.force_spectator_target_id
documentation: Force spectators to look at a specific player by PlayerId. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.spectator_release_player_slot
documentation: Free a player slot held by a spectator. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.spectator_release_player_slot_id
documentation: Free a player slot held by a spectator by PlayerId. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.manual_flow_control_enable
documentation: Enable control of the game flow. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.manual_flow_control_proceed
documentation: Allows the game to proceed. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.manual_flow_control_is_enabled
documentation: Returns whether the manual control of the game flow is enabled.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.manual_flow_control_get_cur_transition
documentation: Returns the transition that is currently blocked, or '' if none. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.check_end_match_condition
documentation: Returns the current match ending condition.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_network_stats
documentation: Returns a struct containing the networks stats of the server. Only available to SuperAdmin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.start_server_lan
documentation: Start a server on LAN, using the current configuration. Only available to SuperAdmin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.start_server_internet
documentation: Start a server on the internet using the specified login and password. Only available to SuperAdmin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_status
documentation: Returns the current status of the server.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.quit_game
documentation: Quit the application. Only available to SuperAdmin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.game_data_directory
documentation: Returns the path of the game data directory. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_tracks_directory
documentation: Returns the path of the tracks directory. Only available to Admin.

methods.name: trackmania.trackmania_client.TrackManiaClient.get_skins_directory
documentation: Returns the path of the skins directory. Only available to Admin.
